entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Sixth-leading cereal crop known for high tolerance to abiotic stress and a good nutrient profile

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress factors that pearl millet is tolerant to

entities.name: NUTRIENT PROFILE
entities.description: The nutritional composition of pearl millet

entities.name: NAC TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: A family of transcription factors that play an important role in abiotic stress tolerance

entities.name: PGNAC21
entities.description: A stress-responsive NAC transcription factor gene from pearl millet

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to reveal that PgNAC21 expression is induced by salinity stress and abscisic acid

entities.name: SALINITY STRESS
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress that induces PgNAC21 expression and affects plant growth

entities.name: ABSCISIC ACID
entities.description: A plant hormone treatment that induces PgNAC21 expression

entities.name: IN SILICO PROMOTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Computational analysis used to identify ABREs and MYB TF binding sites in the PgNAC21 promoter

entities.name: ABA RESPONSE ELEMENTS
entities.description: DNA sequences in the promoter of PgNAC21 that respond to abscisic acid

entities.name: MYB TF BINDING SITES
entities.description: DNA sequences in the promoter of PgNAC21 where MYB transcription factors bind

entities.name: YEAST ONE-HYBRID ASSAY
entities.description: Assay used to indicate that PgMYB1 binds to the promoter of PgNAC21

entities.name: PGMYB1
entities.description: A putative MYB transcription factor in pearl millet that binds to the promoter of PgNAC21

entities.name: TRANSACTIVATION ASSAY
entities.description: Assay used to reveal that PgNAC21 functions as a transcription activator

entities.name: YEAST CELLS
entities.description: Organism used for performing transactivation assays

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION ACTIVATOR
entities.description: A protein that increases the transcription of a gene

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: Model plant used to test the effects of overexpressing PgNAC21

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: A growth parameter improved in Arabidopsis overexpressing PgNAC21 under salinity stress

entities.name: FRESH WEIGHT
entities.description: A growth parameter improved in Arabidopsis overexpressing PgNAC21 under salinity stress

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: A growth parameter improved in Arabidopsis overexpressing PgNAC21 under salinity stress

entities.name: GSTF6
entities.description: A stress-responsive gene (GLUTATHIONE S-TRANSFERASE 6) whose expression is enhanced by PgNAC21 in Arabidopsis

entities.name: COR47
entities.description: A stress-responsive gene (COLD-REGULATED 47) whose expression is enhanced by PgNAC21 in Arabidopsis

entities.name: RD20
entities.description: A stress-responsive gene (RESPONSIVE TO DEHYDRATION 20) whose expression is enhanced by PgNAC21 in Arabidopsis

entities.name: TRANSGENIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Methods used for developing salinity stress tolerance in crop plants
